---
title: "ESM 262 Assignmnet 1"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## See how one predicts the other

Temporal Trends (Time Series)

If your data has time:
Plot NPP and transpiration over time

Need to pick 1:

Look at seasonality (e.g., growing season peaks)
Compute lag relationships (does transpiration lead NPP?)

## Motivation
